categories.description: Gear up for your next adventure

products.name: Car Boot Organiser
products.description: Collapsible multi-compartment trunk storage with anti-slip base
products.fullDescription: Keep your car boot tidy with the EAZYOO Car Boot Organiser. Featuring multiple compartments and a non-slip base, it collapses flat when not in use. Waterproof lining protects against spills. Ideal for groceries, tools, sports kit, and everyday essentials.

products.name: Steering Wheel Phone Mount
products.description: 360° rotating magnetic car phone holder with secure grip
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Magnetic Phone Mount attaches to any air vent and holds your phone securely at any angle. The 360° swivel head lets you position your screen perfectly. Supports all phones up to 7 inches wide.

products.name: Car Seat Gap Filler
products.description: Premium leather console side pocket — 2 pack
products.fullDescription: Stop losing phones, keys, and change down the side of your seat. EAZYOO Seat Gap Fillers slip neatly into the gap between your seat and centre console, preventing items from falling through. Comes in a 2-pack with a multi-pocket design.

products.name: Windscreen Sun Shade
products.description: Foldable UV-blocking windshield sunshade with storage pouch
products.fullDescription: Protect your car's interior from the sun with the EAZYOO Windscreen Sun Shade. Made from reflective material that blocks up to 99% of UV rays, it folds into a compact disc for easy storage in the included pouch. Fits most standard and large windscreens.

products.name: Back Seat Protector
products.description: Waterproof kick mat with tablet holder and storage pockets
products.fullDescription: Keep your back seat clean with the EAZYOO Seat Protector. Children's muddy boots won't damage your upholstery. Features a transparent tablet holder at eye level, multiple storage pockets, and attaches securely to headrests with adjustable straps.

products.name: Car Cup Holder Expander
products.description: Adjustable cup holder insert fits bottles and mugs up to 4 inches
products.fullDescription: Not all car cup holders are equal. The EAZYOO Cup Holder Expander adjusts from 50mm to 100mm to grip any bottle, mug, or can securely — even on bumpy roads. No tools needed, installs in seconds.

products.name: Dashboard Organiser Tray
products.description: Non-slip silicone dashboard mat with raised edges and multiple sections
products.fullDescription: Keep coins, sunglasses, cards and your phone within easy reach on your dashboard. The EAZYOO Dashboard Tray uses non-slip silicone that grips the dash and holds items securely even during sharp braking.

products.name: Car Neck Pillow
products.description: Memory foam headrest pillow with adjustable strap for all seats
products.fullDescription: Long journey? The EAZYOO Car Neck Pillow supports your neck and head during extended drives. Made from slow-recovery memory foam with a breathable mesh cover. Adjustable strap fits any headrest.

products.name: Car Trash Bin
products.description: Collapsible waterproof bin with lid — 5 litre capacity
products.fullDescription: Reduce clutter in your car with the EAZYOO Car Trash Bin. The collapsible design folds flat when empty. Includes a secure lid to prevent odours escaping, plus a car hook for easy hanging.

products.name: Tyre Pressure Gauge
products.description: Digital tyre pressure gauge — reads in PSI, BAR and kPa
products.fullDescription: Check your tyre pressure in seconds with the EAZYOO Digital Tyre Gauge. Accurate to ±1% with an easy-to-read backlit LCD display. Fits all standard valve stems. Comes with a protective carry case.

products.name: Steering Wheel Cover
products.description: Universal anti-slip steering wheel cover in microfibre leather
products.fullDescription: Upgrade your driving experience with the EAZYOO Steering Wheel Cover. The perforated microfibre leather provides a firm, comfortable grip and won't slip. Fits wheels 37–38cm in diameter. Available in black.

products.name: Car Emergency Kit
products.description: 10-piece roadside emergency kit in compact zip case
products.fullDescription: Be prepared for any roadside situation with the EAZYOO Emergency Kit. Includes jumper cables, reflective triangle, first aid essentials, tow rope, and torch — all packed into a compact zipped bag that fits in your boot or glovebox.

products.name: Collapsible Cutting Board
products.description: Foldable chopping board with built-in drain and wash basin
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Collapsible Cutting Board is unlike any you've used before. Chop your ingredients then fold the board into a funnel shape to pour them directly into the pan. Features a built-in wash basin. Folds flat to 2cm for drawer storage. BPA-free and dishwasher safe.

products.name: Magnetic Knife Strip
products.description: Wall-mounted bamboo magnetic knife holder — 40cm
products.fullDescription: Free up your kitchen drawer with the EAZYOO Magnetic Knife Strip. The 40cm natural bamboo bar holds up to 10 knives securely with strong neodymium magnets. Mounts to any wall with the included screws. Safe, sleek, and highly functional.

products.name: Collapsible Colander
products.description: Silicone foldable strainer for pasta, vegetables and fruit
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Collapsible Colander is heat-resistant up to 220°C and collapses to just 4cm for easy storage. Perfect for draining pasta, rinsing vegetables, or washing fruit. Works with pots up to 28cm in diameter.

products.name: Over-Sink Dish Drainer
products.description: Roll-up stainless steel dish rack — sits over the sink
products.fullDescription: Stop wasting worktop space. The EAZYOO Over-Sink Dish Drainer extends across your sink and rolls up for compact storage. Made from food-grade stainless steel with adjustable width feet to fit sinks from 28–55cm wide.

products.name: Herb & Spice Rack
products.description: Rotating bamboo carousel spice rack — holds 16 jars
products.fullDescription: Organise your spices in style with the EAZYOO Rotating Spice Rack. The bamboo turntable holds 16 standard spice jars (up to 6.5cm diameter) and rotates 360° for easy access. Compact enough for all kitchen worktops.

products.name: Stackable Food Containers
products.description: 5-piece airtight meal prep containers — microwave & freezer safe
products.fullDescription: Keep meals fresh with the EAZYOO 5-piece Container Set. Each container has an airtight, leak-proof lid with 4 side clips. Stackable design saves fridge space. Safe for microwave, freezer, and dishwasher. Sizes: 500ml, 800ml (x2), 1.2L, 1.8L.

products.name: Soap Dispenser Pump
products.description: Refillable stainless steel lotion pump — 300ml capacity
products.fullDescription: Elevate your kitchen sink with the EAZYOO Soap Dispenser. The brushed stainless steel pump holds 300ml of soap or lotion and has a weighted straw to ensure every drop is used. Wide-mouth refill opening for mess-free topping up.

products.name: Cast Iron Trivet
products.description: Decorative cast iron pot stand — heat resistant to 400°C
products.fullDescription: Protect your worktops with the EAZYOO Cast Iron Trivet. The decorative geometric pattern looks beautiful and handles extreme heat with ease. Heavy-duty construction means it won't slide or tip. Perfect for cast iron pans, pots, and teapots.

products.name: Bamboo Bread Bin
products.description: Ventilated bamboo bread box with roll-top lid — keeps loaves fresh
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Bamboo Bread Bin features a roll-top lid and ventilation holes to keep your bread fresher for longer. Large enough for two standard loaves. Natural bamboo is naturally antibacterial and moisture resistant.

products.name: Non-Stick Roasting Tray
products.description: Heavy-gauge carbon steel roasting pan with rack — oven safe to 260°C
products.fullDescription: Roast perfectly every time with the EAZYOO Roasting Tray. The heavy-gauge carbon steel pan with non-stick coating handles everything from Sunday roasts to vegetables and fish. Includes a removable rack. Dishwasher safe.

products.name: Electric Milk Frother
products.description: Handheld battery-operated foam maker for coffee and matcha
products.fullDescription: Make barista-quality coffee at home. The EAZYOO Milk Frother creates rich, silky foam in seconds. Works with all types of milk — dairy, oat, almond, and more. Battery operated for easy use anywhere. Includes a stand.

products.name: Vegetable Spiralizer
products.description: 5-blade countertop spiralizer for courgette, carrot, and more
products.fullDescription: Create healthy vegetable noodles in seconds with the EAZYOO 5-Blade Spiralizer. Strong suction cups hold it firmly to your worktop while you spiral courgettes, carrots, beetroot and more. Dishwasher-safe blades store inside the unit.

products.name: Garden Kneeling Pad
products.description: Thick EVA foam kneeling mat with handles — waterproof
products.fullDescription: Protect your knees while gardening with the EAZYOO Kneeling Pad. The thick EVA foam cushion provides excellent support, while the waterproof coating prevents soil and moisture from seeping through. Built-in handles make it easy to carry.

products.name: Solar Garden Lights
products.description: Pack of 4 solar-powered pathway spike lights — auto on at dusk
products.fullDescription: Light up your garden paths and flowerbeds with EAZYOO Solar Pathway Lights. Solar charged during the day, they automatically turn on at dusk and off at dawn. Stainless steel construction stands up to all weather. Pack of 4.

products.name: Expandable Garden Hose
products.description: Lightweight flexible hose — expands to 30m when in use
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Expandable Garden Hose collapses to a compact 10m when not in use and expands to the full 30m under water pressure. Lightweight and tangle-free. Includes an 8-pattern spray nozzle and hose connectors.

products.name: Potting Tray
products.description: Large waterproof potting mat — reduces mess when repotting
products.fullDescription: Re-pot plants mess-free with the EAZYOO Potting Tray. The large mat catches soil and debris while you work. The raised edges keep everything contained. Wipe or rinse clean afterwards. Folds flat for compact storage.

products.name: Plant Watering Globe
products.description: Self-watering glass globe spikes — set of 4, keeps plants hydrated
products.fullDescription: Keep your houseplants hydrated while you're on holiday. EAZYOO Glass Watering Globes slowly release water into the soil over 2–3 weeks. Simply fill, insert into compost, and leave your plants to self-water. Set of 4 in mixed colours.

products.name: Raised Bed Liner
products.description: Heavy-duty weed-suppressing garden bed liner — 2m × 5m roll
products.fullDescription: Suppress weeds and retain moisture with the EAZYOO Raised Bed Liner. The heavy-duty geo-textile fabric lets water and air through while blocking weed growth. Includes 20 ground pins for secure fixing. 2m × 5m roll.

products.name: Garden Tool Set
products.description: 5-piece stainless steel gardening tools with ergonomic handles
products.fullDescription: Everything you need to maintain your garden. The EAZYOO 5-Piece Garden Tool Set includes a trowel, fork, transplanter, weeder, and hand rake — all with non-slip ergonomic grips. Stainless steel heads won't rust or bend.

products.name: Compost Bin
products.description: 220L capacity outdoor composting bin with lockable lid
products.fullDescription: Turn kitchen and garden waste into rich compost with the EAZYOO Compost Bin. The 220L capacity handles large families. The lockable lid keeps pests out. Ventilation slots on all sides promote aerobic decomposition. Made from 100% recycled plastic.

products.name: Hanging Basket Liner
products.description: Natural coco fibre basket liner — 35cm round, pack of 5
products.fullDescription: Give your hanging baskets a natural, attractive finish with EAZYOO Coco Liner inserts. Natural coco fibre retains moisture while allowing drainage. Pre-shaped to fit 35cm round baskets. Biodegradable and eco-friendly. Pack of 5.

products.name: Patio Furniture Cover
products.description: Heavy-duty waterproof cover for outdoor tables and chairs
products.fullDescription: Protect your outdoor furniture all year round with the EAZYOO Patio Cover. Made from 210D Oxford fabric with a waterproof PVC coating, it covers tables up to 180 × 100cm. Adjustable drawstring hem and two securing straps keep it in place on windy days.

products.name: Seed Starting Kit
products.description: 72-cell seed tray with humidity dome and drainage tray
products.fullDescription: Get your seeds off to the best start with the EAZYOO Seed Starter Kit. The 72-cell tray provides individual growing cells for perfect root development. The clear humidity dome maintains moisture levels. Drainage holes prevent overwatering.

products.name: Collapsible Pet Bowl
products.description: Foldable silicone travel bowl — food and water safe, 700ml
products.fullDescription: Take your pet's bowl anywhere with the EAZYOO Collapsible Pet Bowl. The flexible food-grade silicone collapses flat to 2cm for pocket storage. Holds 700ml — suitable for food or water. BPA-free and dishwasher safe.

products.name: Slow Feeder Dog Bowl
products.description: Anti-gulp maze bowl for dogs — reduces bloat and aids digestion
products.fullDescription: Help your dog eat at a healthier pace with the EAZYOO Slow Feeder Bowl. The raised maze design forces dogs to eat slowly, reducing bloat and improving digestion. The non-slip silicone base keeps it in place. Available in two sizes.

products.name: Pet Grooming Glove
products.description: Silicone deshedding mitt — removes loose fur gently while petting
products.fullDescription: Turn grooming into a bonding session with the EAZYOO Pet Grooming Glove. The flexible silicone tips massage and deshed simultaneously. Works on dogs, cats, and horses. Adjustable wrist strap for secure fit. Easy to clean — simply rinse under a tap.

products.name: Cat Scratching Post
products.description: Tall sisal rope cat post with plush top perch — 70cm
products.fullDescription: Give your cat a dedicated place to scratch and play. The EAZYOO Cat Scratching Post features a sturdy base and 70cm sisal-wrapped post topped with a plush perch. Cats can scratch, climb, and nap all in one spot.

products.name: Pet Travel Carrier
products.description: Soft-sided foldable airline-approved carrier — up to 6kg pets
products.fullDescription: Travel stress-free with your small pet. The EAZYOO Pet Carrier features mesh ventilation panels, a fleece inner mat, and multiple entry points. Airline approved carry-on size. Folds flat when not in use. Fits dogs and cats up to 6kg.

products.name: Automatic Pet Feeder
products.description: Digital timed food dispenser — up to 4 meals per day, 2.4L hopper
products.fullDescription: Never miss a pet mealtime with the EAZYOO Automatic Feeder. Set up to 4 daily meals with custom portion sizes. The 2.4L hopper holds up to 4kg of dry food. LCD display and simple programming. Works on mains or 3× AA batteries as backup.

products.name: Dog Seat Belt
products.description: Adjustable car harness clip — fits all dogs and seat belt buckles
products.fullDescription: Keep your dog safe in the car with the EAZYOO Dog Seat Belt. The elastic bungee cord absorbs sudden braking forces. Clips to your dog's harness on one end and the seat belt buckle on the other. Adjustable from 25–75cm.

products.name: Pet Water Fountain
products.description: 1.5L circulating filter fountain — encourages cats & dogs to drink
products.fullDescription: Many pets prefer running water. The EAZYOO Pet Fountain provides a gentle, continuous stream that encourages drinking and helps prevent urinary issues. The replaceable carbon filter removes impurities. Ultra-quiet pump.

products.name: Flea & Tick Comb
products.description: Fine-tooth dual-sided comb for flea detection and grooming
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Flea & Tick Comb has fine-tooth and wide-tooth sides for thorough grooming and parasite detection. The stainless steel teeth slide through all coat types. Ergonomic rubber handle prevents hand fatigue during long grooming sessions.

products.name: Pet Waste Bag Dispenser
products.description: Refillable dog poop bag holder with carabiner clip — 180 bags included
products.fullDescription: Never be caught without a bag on a walk again. The EAZYOO Dispenser attaches to your lead with a carabiner clip. Includes 180 biodegradable bags across 12 rolls. Wide-mouth opening makes one-handed use simple.

products.name: Dog Cooling Mat
products.description: Self-cooling pressure-activated gel mat — no electricity needed, 90×60cm
products.fullDescription: Keep your dog cool in summer with the EAZYOO Cooling Mat. The pressure-activated gel absorbs heat from your pet and self-recharges after 15–20 minutes without use. No electricity, water, or refrigeration needed. Wipe-clean surface.

products.name: Interactive Puzzle Feeder
products.description: Level 2 mental stimulation puzzle toy — hides treats in sliding compartments
products.fullDescription: Challenge your pet's mind with the EAZYOO Interactive Puzzle Feeder. Hide treats in the sliding drawers and rotating compartments and let your dog or cat work to retrieve them. Level 2 difficulty — suitable for intermediate problem solvers.

products.name: Dog Raincoat
products.description: Waterproof hooded dog jacket with reflective strips — sizes S–XL
products.fullDescription: Keep your dog dry and visible on wet walks. The EAZYOO Dog Raincoat features a waterproof ripstop outer, a reflective strip for safety in low light, and a velcro fastening belly strap. Available in sizes Small to XL.

products.name: Orthopedic Dog Bed
products.description: Memory foam pet mattress with washable fleece cover — Large 90×70cm
products.fullDescription: Give your dog the best night's sleep with the EAZYOO Orthopedic Bed. The 7cm memory foam base moulds to your dog's body and relieves pressure on joints — ideal for older dogs. The plush fleece cover zips off for machine washing.

products.name: Magnetic Building Blocks
products.description: 60-piece magnetic tiles set for creative 3D building
products.fullDescription: Inspire creativity in children aged 3+ with EAZYOO Magnetic Building Blocks. The 60-piece set includes squares, triangles, and pentagons with strong magnets in all edges. Build houses, towers, animals, and anything you can imagine. STEM learning through play.

products.name: Wooden Puzzles Set
products.description: 4-pack themed wooden jigsaws — animals, vehicles, numbers, letters
products.fullDescription: Help young children develop fine motor skills and problem-solving with EAZYOO Wooden Puzzles. The set of 4 includes animals, vehicles, numbers, and alphabet themed puzzles in a sturdy wooden frame. Chunky pieces for small hands.

products.name: Outdoor Giant Jenga
products.description: 54-block stacking tower game — builds to over 90cm tall
products.fullDescription: Bring the classic stacking game outside with EAZYOO Giant Jenga. The 54 solid pine blocks build to over 90cm before toppling. Includes a carry bag for easy storage and transport. Suitable for all ages.

products.name: Kinetic Sand Kit
products.description: 1kg kinetic sensory sand with 8 moulds and tray
products.fullDescription: Hours of creative, mess-free play with EAZYOO Kinetic Sand. The magical sand sticks to itself but not to hands or surfaces. Includes 1kg of sand, 8 shaped moulds, and a containment tray. Perfect for developing creativity and sensory play.

products.name: Science Experiment Kit
products.description: 25 STEM experiments kit for children aged 8–14
products.fullDescription: Ignite curiosity with the EAZYOO Science Kit. 25 fascinating experiments covering chemistry, physics, and biology. Includes all materials, instructions, and a 48-page illustrated guide. Designed for ages 8–14. No lab needed — everything works on your kitchen table.

products.name: RC Racing Car
products.description: 1:16 scale remote control racing car — 25km/h, 40m range
products.fullDescription: Full speed ahead! The EAZYOO RC Racing Car reaches 25km/h and responds to controls up to 40 metres away. 4-wheel independent suspension handles bumpy terrain. USB rechargeable in just 90 minutes. Suitable for ages 8+.

products.name: Glow-in-Dark Stars Pack
products.description: 200-piece adhesive ceiling stars for kids bedrooms — glows 8 hours
products.fullDescription: Transform a child's bedroom into a galaxy. EAZYOO Glow Stars stick to ceilings and walls without marks and glow for up to 8 hours after a few minutes of light exposure. Includes stars in 3 sizes plus a crescent moon. Pack of 200.

products.name: Art Supply Set
products.description: 145-piece drawing and colouring kit for young artists
products.fullDescription: Everything a young artist needs in one portable carry case. Includes colouring pencils, washable markers, oil pastels, watercolour paints, fine liners, and a sketchpad. All stored in a zippered fabric carry case with elastic loops.

products.name: Foam Pool Noodles
products.description: 6-pack foam swimming pool noodles — 160cm each, assorted colours
products.fullDescription: Make pool time more fun. EAZYOO Pool Noodles are full-length 160cm foam tubes in 6 assorted colours. Use them for floating, pool games, swimming aids, or craft projects. High-density foam maintains buoyancy. Pack of 6.

products.name: Card Game Bundle
products.description: Family game night bundle — Uno, Go Fish, Snap and more (5 games)
products.fullDescription: Everything you need for a great family game night. EAZYOO's Card Game Bundle includes 5 classic card games: Uno-style, Go Fish, Snap, Old Maid, and Happy Families. Each game in its own tuck box. Ages 4 and up.

products.name: Running Water Bottle
products.description: Collapsible 500ml soft flask — BPA-free, 2-pack
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Running Bottle collapses flat as it empties, so there's no sloshing and it takes up less space in your pack. The wide-mouth lid allows easy drinking and filling. BPA-free food-grade silicone. Dishwasher safe. Pack of 2.

products.name: Foam Roller
products.description: High-density EVA foam roller for muscle recovery — 45cm
products.fullDescription: Speed up recovery and reduce muscle soreness with the EAZYOO Foam Roller. The high-density EVA foam maintains its shape through hundreds of sessions. Textured surface provides deeper myofascial release. 45cm length suitable for back, legs, and ITB.

products.name: Resistance Band Set
products.description: 5-level fabric resistance bands with carry bag — glutes & legs
products.fullDescription: Build strength and improve mobility with the EAZYOO Resistance Band Set. Five bands in progressive resistance levels (Extra Light to Extra Heavy). Fabric construction won't roll up or snap like latex bands. Carry bag included for gym use.

products.name: Gym Gloves
products.description: Half-finger lifting gloves with wrist support — sizes S to XL
products.fullDescription: Protect your palms and wrists with EAZYOO Gym Gloves. The padded palm absorbs barbell pressure while the breathable mesh back keeps your hands cool. Adjustable wrist wrap provides extra support for heavy lifts. Available S to XL.

products.name: Camping Lantern
products.description: Collapsible solar LED lantern — 3 modes, 10-hour battery life
products.fullDescription: Light up your campsite without the bulk. The EAZYOO Camping Lantern collapses flat for packing and expands to a 20cm lantern in seconds. Solar-powered with USB backup charging. 3 brightness modes. Water resistant. Carabiner included.

products.name: Hydration Running Belt
products.description: Adjustable waist belt with 2× 250ml flasks and phone pocket
products.fullDescription: Stay hydrated on long runs without carrying a bag. The EAZYOO Hydration Belt sits snugly around your waist with a bounce-free design. Includes two 250ml soft flasks and a zippered phone pocket. Fits waists 60–110cm.

products.name: Yoga Mat
products.description: Non-slip 6mm TPE yoga mat with alignment lines and carry strap
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Yoga Mat provides excellent grip for both the top and bottom surface, preventing slipping on any floor. The 6mm TPE foam cushions joints effectively. Built-in alignment lines help perfect your poses. Includes carry strap and bag.

products.name: Trekking Poles
products.description: Collapsible 3-section aluminium walking poles — pair
products.fullDescription: Conquer any terrain with EAZYOO Trekking Poles. The 3-section aluminium construction collapses to 65cm for backpack storage. Comfortable cork grip absorbs vibration and wick sweat. Includes rubber tips and carbide spike tips. Adjustable 105–135cm.

products.name: Jump Rope
products.description: Speed skipping rope with ball bearing handles — adjustable to 3m
products.fullDescription: Level up your cardio with the EAZYOO Speed Rope. The precision ball bearings in the handles allow the rope to spin freely for maximum speed. Adjustable length up to 3m. Comfortable foam grip handles. Suitable for all fitness levels.

products.name: Insulated Sport Bottle
products.description: 750ml vacuum-insulated stainless steel bottle — keeps cold 24h / hot 12h
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Insulated Bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours, thanks to double-wall vacuum insulation. The wide mouth accepts ice cubes and is easy to clean. Leakproof flip lid. BPA-free. 750ml capacity.

products.name: Waterproof Dry Bag
products.description: 10L roll-top waterproof bag for kayaking, hiking, and beach
products.fullDescription: Keep your valuables dry whatever the conditions. The EAZYOO Dry Bag uses a roll-top closure and fully welded seams to create a 100% waterproof seal. 10L capacity for a day's essentials. Includes a detachable carry strap.

products.name: Exercise Dice Set
products.description: 7-piece foam workout dice — randomise your exercise routine
products.fullDescription: Never have a boring workout again. Roll the EAZYOO Exercise Dice and let chance decide your routine. 7 large foam dice cover exercises, reps, body parts, duration, and challenges. Great for home gyms, group fitness, and team-building.

products.name: Massage Ball Set
products.description: 3-piece lacrosse massage balls — smooth, spiky, and peanut
products.fullDescription: Target tight muscles with EAZYOO Massage Balls. The set includes a smooth lacrosse ball for general use, a spiky ball for deep tissue stimulation, and a peanut double ball for spine and hamstrings. All made from natural rubber.

products.name: Desk Organiser Set
products.description: 5-compartment bamboo desktop organiser — holds stationery and cables
products.fullDescription: Tidy up your desk with the EAZYOO Bamboo Organiser. Five compartments in varying sizes hold pens, scissors, cables, phones, and notepads. Natural bamboo is sustainably sourced and easy to wipe clean. Weighted base prevents tipping.

products.name: A5 Hardback Notebook
products.description: 160-page dot-grid hardback journal with ribbon bookmark
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO A5 Dot Grid Notebook features 160 pages of 90gsm acid-free paper — thick enough to prevent ink bleed-through. The lay-flat binding opens completely flat for comfortable writing. Includes an elastic closure and satin ribbon bookmark.

products.name: Monitor Stand Riser
products.description: Adjustable bamboo monitor riser with USB hub and storage shelf
products.fullDescription: Elevate your monitor to eye level and reduce neck strain with the EAZYOO Monitor Stand. The bamboo platform holds monitors up to 32 inches and 15kg. Built-in 2-port USB hub at the side. Storage shelf below for keyboard or files.

products.name: Wireless Charging Pad
products.description: 15W fast wireless charger — Qi compatible, LED indicator
products.fullDescription: Charge your phone without the cable clutter. The EAZYOO Wireless Charging Pad delivers up to 15W fast charging for compatible phones. Slim profile sits on your desk with an LED charging indicator. Compatible with all Qi devices including iPhone and Android.

products.name: Cable Management Box
products.description: Large plastic cable tidy box — hides power strips and trailing leads
products.fullDescription: Eliminate cable clutter with the EAZYOO Cable Box. Large enough to hide a 4-socket power strip with all cables inside. The ventilated lid allows heat to escape safely. Side cable slots keep everything neat and organised.

products.name: Whiteboard Planner
products.description: A3 magnetic weekly planner whiteboard with pen and eraser
products.fullDescription: Plan your week at a glance with the EAZYOO Magnetic Whiteboard Planner. The A3 board fits neatly on desks or walls with the included magnetic fixings. Wipe-clean surface works with any dry-erase marker. Includes a marker and eraser.

products.name: Pen & Pencil Set
products.description: 30-piece premium writing set — ballpoints, fineliner, and highlighters
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO 30-Piece Writing Set covers everything you need for note-taking, journaling, and planning. Includes 10 ballpoint pens in assorted colours, 10 fineliners (0.4mm), and 10 highlighters in classic and pastel colours. All in a zip pouch.

products.name: Sticky Note Dispenser
products.description: Bamboo pop-up sticky note holder — includes 200 notes, 4 colours
products.fullDescription: The EAZYOO Bamboo Note Dispenser automatically presents the next note as you take one, keeping your desk tidy. The natural bamboo base is weighted to prevent sliding. Includes 200 notes across 4 bright colours.

products.name: Lap Desk
products.description: Adjustable laptop lap desk with cushion and mouse pad
products.fullDescription: Work comfortably from your sofa with the EAZYOO Lap Desk. The tilt-adjustable surface raises to 6 positions for optimal ergonomics. The built-in cushion distributes weight evenly on your lap. Integrated mousepad and phone groove.

products.name: Document Scanner Sleeve
products.description: Protective A4 document carrier wallet with RFID blocking — 10 pack
products.fullDescription: Protect and organise your important documents with EAZYOO Document Sleeves. The clear front and solid back allow quick identification. RFID-blocking material prevents digital theft. Pack of 10 in A4 size.

products.name: Packing Cubes Set
products.description: 6-piece luggage packing cubes in 3 sizes — lightweight mesh
products.fullDescription: Pack smarter and stay organised with EAZYOO Packing Cubes. The set of 6 (2× large, 2× medium, 2× small) fits neatly inside any suitcase or backpack. Breathable mesh top keeps contents visible. Double zip ensures secure closure. Colour-coded by size.

products.name: RFID Travel Wallet
products.description: Slim travel wallet with RFID protection — holds passport and cards
products.fullDescription: Travel without worry. The EAZYOO RFID Travel Wallet holds your passport, boarding pass, up to 8 cards, SIM cards, and notes. RFID-blocking lining protects your data from contactless skimming. Premium PU leather outer.

products.name: Travel Neck Pillow
products.description: Memory foam U-shaped neck pillow with snap-on carry hook
products.fullDescription: Rest comfortably on any journey with the EAZYOO Travel Neck Pillow. Slow-recovery memory foam moulds to your neck shape. Removable and washable velour cover. The snap-on hook clips to any luggage handle for carrying. Compresses for storage.

products.name: Luggage Scale
products.description: Digital hanging luggage scale — up to 50kg, reads in kg and lbs
products.fullDescription: Avoid overweight bag charges with the EAZYOO Digital Luggage Scale. Hook onto any bag handle and lift to get an instant weight reading up to 50kg. Auto-lock feature holds the reading after you set the bag down. Includes CR2032 battery.

products.name: Compression Dry Bags
products.description: 4-pack vacuum compression bags for suitcase — save 70% space
products.fullDescription: Fit twice as much in your suitcase. EAZYOO Compression Bags roll up to squeeze all the air out — no vacuum pump needed. The waterproof bags protect against damp and mildew. Pack of 4 in mixed sizes (S, M, L, XL).

products.name: Universal Travel Adapter
products.description: Worldwide travel adapter with 3 USB ports — works in 150+ countries
products.fullDescription: One adapter for every destination. The EAZYOO Universal Adapter works in over 150 countries with a slide-out plug selector. Three USB-A ports plus one USB-C port allow simultaneous charging of 4 devices. Built-in surge protection.

products.name: Toiletry Bag
products.description: Large hanging travel toiletry bag with waterproof lining — 4 pockets
products.fullDescription: Keep all your travel toiletries in order with the EAZYOO Hanging Toiletry Bag. Unfolds to reveal 4 pockets and a hanging hook — perfect for hotel bathrooms. Waterproof lining protects against spills. Rolls up compact for packing.

products.name: Portable Door Lock
products.description: Hotel travel safety door lock — works on any inward-opening door
products.fullDescription: Add an extra layer of security to any hotel room or Airbnb with the EAZYOO Portable Door Lock. Simply slot it into the door's strike plate to prevent anyone opening the door from outside — even with a key. Compact and lightweight.

products.name: Travel Umbrella
products.description: Windproof compact folding umbrella — auto open/close, 8-rib design
products.fullDescription: Be ready for any weather. The EAZYOO Travel Umbrella features an auto-open/close button, a reinforced 8-rib fibreglass frame that withstands winds up to 60mph, and collapses to just 27cm for bag carry. UV-coating on the canopy.

products.name: Cable Organiser Pouch
products.description: Compact tech cable pouch — holds chargers, cables, earbuds, adapters
products.fullDescription: Keep all your travel tech cables and accessories organised in the EAZYOO Cable Pouch. 6 elastic loops and 3 mesh pockets hold chargers, cables, earbuds, SDs cards, USB sticks, and adapters. Hard shell case protects fragile items.

products.name: Eye Mask & Earplug Set
products.description: Contoured 3D sleep mask with 6 foam earplugs — travel sleep kit
products.fullDescription: Sleep anywhere, anytime with the EAZYOO Sleep Kit. The 3D contoured eye mask lets your eyes open and blink naturally while blocking 100% of light. Soft memory foam padding. Includes 6 high-attenuation foam earplugs (33dB reduction). Carry pouch included.

products.name: Luggage Tag Set
products.description: 4-pack leather luggage tags with privacy cover — assorted colours
products.fullDescription: Spot your bag on the carousel in seconds. EAZYOO Luggage Tags are made from premium PU leather with a privacy flap to hide your contact details until needed. Set of 4 in assorted colours. Stainless steel loop attachment.

posts.title: EAZYOO Now Open to Wholesale Partners Across the UK
posts.excerpt: We're inviting sports shops, kitchen stores, gyms, and online retailers to stock EAZYOO products. Here's how to apply.
posts.content:
We're excited to announce that EAZYOO is now accepting wholesale applications from retailers across the United Kingdom.

Whether you run a physical shop, an online store, a gym, or an outdoor outfitter — if your customers would love smart, space-saving products, we'd love to work with you.

What We Offer Partners

  • Competitive wholesale pricing with healthy margins for your business
  • Low minimum order quantities to suit businesses of all sizes
  • UK-based fulfilment — fast delivery, no import headaches
  • Marketing support — product images, descriptions, and brand assets provided

How to Apply

Visit our Wholesale Application page and fill in the form. Our team reviews every application and responds within 2-3 business days.

posts.title: Small Kitchen? 7 Space-Saving Hacks You Need to Try
posts.excerpt: Living with a compact kitchen doesn't mean compromising. These seven practical tips will help you make the most of every inch.
posts.content:
A small kitchen doesn't have to feel cramped. With the right approach, you can cook, prep, and store everything you need — without clutter. Here are seven hacks we swear by:

1. Use Collapsible Tools

Foldable cutting boards, collapsible colanders, and nesting bowls store flat in drawers instead of hogging cupboard space.

2. Go Vertical

Wall-mounted magnetic knife strips, hanging racks, and shelf risers turn dead wall and cupboard space into usable storage.

3. Clear Your Worktops

If you don't use it daily, store it. A clear worktop makes a small kitchen feel twice the size.

posts.title: 5 Reasons a Collapsible Water Bottle Beats a Regular One
posts.excerpt: Still carrying a bulky water bottle? Here are five reasons to switch to a collapsible flask for running, hiking, and everyday hydration.
posts.content:
If you're still lugging around a rigid water bottle, you're carrying more than you need to. Here's why collapsible bottles are the smarter choice:

1. They Fold Flat

When empty, a collapsible bottle rolls up or folds down to a fraction of its size.

2. They're Lighter

Made from flexible, food-grade silicone, collapsible bottles weigh significantly less than metal or hard plastic alternatives.

3. Perfect for Travel

Fold it flat before airport security, then fill up at a water fountain on the other side.

posts.title: Welcome to EAZYOO — Smart Products for Smarter Living
posts.excerpt: We're EAZYOO, a UK-based brand on a mission to make everyday products more portable, more practical, and built to last.
posts.content:
Welcome to the EAZYOO blog! We're a UK-based brand creating innovative, space-saving products for active lifestyles and modern kitchens.

Our journey started with a simple observation: the products we use every day take up far too much space. So we asked ourselves: what if they could fold?

That question led to our first products, now available on Amazon UK.
